caption:
📍 Location: Shishikura
1-25-3 Ebisu, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0013, Japan
(5-minute walk from Ebisu Station)

🕒 Hours: Lunch time only
Reservation required

⚠️ Reservation Notice
Reservations are made via TableCheck (not Tabelog).

📱 For iPhone users:
Please take a screenshot of the link below and copy & paste it into your web browser to make a reservation.

🔗 Reservation link:

https://www.tablecheck.com/shops/shishikura/reserve?utm_source=influencer

💰 Budget: $38 (5,800 yen)

#tokyo #localgems #sushi #lunch #omakase
transcript: What's the best sushi in Tokyo? My store. Why? I'll eat a 5,900 yen for a natural omakase. Okay! Let's go! If you're looking for the best affordable omakase in Tokyo, check this out. It's tucked away in Ebisu. Shishikura is a hidden sushi restaurant where Chef Shishikura-san serves an incredible omakase lunch course for only $38. He carefully selects natural, high-quality ingredients, creating dishes that highlight true craftsmanship and delicate balance. You'll enjoy a wide variety dishes. From fresh sashimi and crispy tempura to beautifully crafted nigiri made with his expert skills, everything is refined, elegant, and full of flavor. Make sure to book in advance. Comment omakase for more info.

transcript_segments.text: What's the best sushi in Tokyo?
I'll eat a 5,900 yen for a natural omakase.
If you're looking for the best affordable omakase in Tokyo,
Shishikura is a hidden sushi restaurant
where Chef Shishikura-san serves an incredible omakase lunch course
He carefully selects natural, high-quality ingredients,
creating dishes that highlight true craftsmanship and delicate balance.
You'll enjoy a wide variety dishes.
From fresh sashimi and crispy tempura
to beautifully crafted nigiri made with his expert skills,
everything is refined, elegant, and full of flavor.
Make sure to book in advance.
